---
title: "BCB420 Assignment 2"
author: "Feiyang Sun"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: cerulean
    highlight: tango
    fig_caption: true
    df_print: paged 
    code_folding: hide
bibliography: A2_references.bib
csl: apa.csl
nocite: '@*'
link-citations: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

# Introduction

## Dataset selection and information




# Link to journal entry
A2 journal entry could be found [here](https://github.com/bcb420-2026/Feiyang_Sun/wiki/Assignment-2).

# References
